query:
SELECT t.id, t.description, t.amount, t.date, t.accountId 
FROM transactions t 
WHERE t.description LIKE 'Venda: teste%' OR t.description LIKE 'Venda: Teste%'
ORDER BY t.id DESC 
LIMIT 30;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user Z4v8rgvhEcHgMj9.4da899f25bfe --database cYohVG6kDdBXzZ5ngZYKYq --execute SELECT t.id, t.description, t.amount, t.date, t.accountId 
FROM transactions t 
WHERE t.description LIKE 'Venda: teste%' OR t.description LIKE 'Venda: Teste%'
ORDER BY t.id DESC 
LIMIT 30;
